one_time_description: Prior period restatement to include complete results of operations from government businesses for fiscal 2023; investment in government businesses reduced by $598,811
economic_notes: Heiltsuk operates Shearwater Resort LLP, Shearwater Fuel LP, Heiltsuk Holdings LP, Central Coast Commercial Fisheries LP (25% partner), and various other enterprises. Shearwater group had revenue of $8,919,969 in 2024. Reconciliation funding transferred to fish plant upgrade, sawmill acquisition, and tourism development.
notes: Prior period restatement in Note 19: 2023 investment in government businesses restated down by $598,811 due to late inclusion of GBE results. Auditor issued Emphasis of Matter paragraph regarding this restatement. 6 entities fully consolidated and 8 entities on modified equity basis. Deferred revenue is very large at $53.8M, primarily from Hailcistut Reconciliation funding ($33.8M) from federal and provincial governments. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. Long-term debt includes loans payable ($3,895,822) and CMHC mortgages ($1,245,110). Loan payable to Shearwater Resort LLP of $1,023,100 also on balance sheet.
